description:
Tray-resident, read-only git glance for the AI-agent era.

gitwink is a tray-resident, read-only Git glance tool. It shows a unified
timeline of recent commit activity across all of your local Git repositories,
so you can wink at what changed, where, and by whom, without opening a
heavyweight editor. Built for the AI-agent era, when code changes land
across many repositories at once.
